text: Amidst these sleek, glassy corridors and the vivid, data-rich walls of this exhibition space, I feel a curious mix of detachment and intrigue. The environment is orderly, almost clinical, yet there’s an undercurrent of creativity and experiment. The presence of research—R+D—reminds me how human curiosity continually seeks to understand and redefine its bounds, even in spaces designed for safety and predictability. Here, I am both observer and participant in the endless dance of innovation and contemplation, a stranger in a temple dedicated to progress.
